message:
feat(search_bridge): Cx-first cancellation entry point (ft-xbnl0.2.2)

Add SearchBridge::search_with_asupersync_cx + spawn_asupersync_cancellation_watcher
so the TwoTierSearcher bridge can observe the caller's asupersync Cx
directly instead of relying on the caller to pre-cancel through
BridgeCancellationToken. Matches the pattern CC-1 has been applying to
caut.rs (151d689c), retry.rs (f4fbb7d4), session_retention.rs
(94faa166), telemetry.rs (820d95a9), watchdog.rs (137eff4e),
restore_process.rs (4ed91d7d), and survival.rs (bb7a96b6).

New Cx-first API (asupersync-runtime only):
- SearchBridge::search_with_asupersync_cx(&self, cx: &crate::cx::Cx, request, on_phase)
  pre-cancel short-circuits when cx.is_cancel_requested(), otherwise
  wires the asupersync Cx → BridgeCancellationToken → frankensearch Cx
  cancellation chain via the existing spawn_cancellation_thread plus
  the new spawn_asupersync_cancellation_watcher symmetric helper.

Implementation:
- spawn_asupersync_cancellation_watcher is the symmetric companion to
  spawn_cancellation_thread: the first drives BridgeCancellationToken
  from the asupersync Cx, the second drives the frankensearch Cx from
  the token. Same std::thread + park_timeout + done-flag shape.
- Both short paths (pre-cancelled Cx, pre-cancelled token) skip thread
  spawn entirely — no leaked watchers.

New deterministic LabRuntime tests (labruntime_search_bridge, 6 tests):
- search_with_asupersync_cx_precancelled_short_circuits — pre-cancel
  must return SearchBridgeError::Cancelled without invoking searcher
- watcher_propagates_precancelled_cx — short path: already-cancelled
  Cx cancels token and skips thread spawn
- watcher_short_circuits_when_token_precancelled — short path:
  already-cancelled token skips thread spawn without touching Cx
- bridge_cancellation_token_defaults — idempotent cancel semantics
- search_bridge_request_defaults — SearchBridgeRequest field defaults
- search_bridge_error_display — Cancelled reason surfaces in Display

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-cc2-target):
- cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib search_bridge::tests:: :
  55/55 pass (49 existing + 6 new LabRuntime)
- cargo check -p frankenterm-core --lib: clean
- cargo fmt --check: clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
